allow: PowerShell($py = \(Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($py\) { "py -> $\($py.Source\)"; py --version } else { $p = \(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($p\) { "python -> $\($p.Source\)"; python --version } else { "no python found" } })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $h = Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:8000/api/health -TimeoutSec 8; "HEALTH: $\($h | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)" } catch { "health error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(foreach \($c in @\('git','gh','railway','flyctl','fly','render','docker','node','npm'\)\) { $g = Get-Command $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($g\) { "{0,-10} {1}" -f $c, $g.Source } else { "{0,-10} \(not installed\)" -f $c } })
